title: Occidental Petroleum stock climbs as Warren Buffett ups holdings
text: Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY) shares rose nearly 4% to $61.76 on Tuesday after a regulatory filing showed that Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway purchased an additional 3.7 million shares in Occidental, one of the largest oil producers in the US, between March 23 and March 27, 2023, valued at about $216 million. Berkshire also purchased 8 million shares of OXY stock between March 13 and March 16, as well as adding about 6 million shares earlier in the month.
